title: Manual Observation Batch 0

selection_rationale.summary: Prioritizes old-platform-compatible software, member-level discovery, driver/support-media, and article/page evidence queries where Eureka now has internal fixture-backed results or useful partial evidence.
criteria: Selected primary wedge: old-platform-compatible software search.
Selected secondary wedge: member-level discovery inside bundles.
Queries are understandable for a human observer.
Queries can expose smallest-actionable-unit, compatibility clarity, source-backed evidence, or parent-vs-member differences.
The batch stays small enough for manual observation discipline.

do_not_do: do not call live Internet Archive APIs
do not call external web APIs
do not mark pending slots observed without human evidence
do not treat one observation as global truth
notes: Search Usefulness Audit status should not change until real human observations are committed.
Comparison reports should wait until observed records exist.
